failure_movement.justification: empty 18->12 correct direction but predicted <5 (overshot). unknown 29->52 GREW; prediction said shrinks to ~20-24, wrong direction on the dominant cluster. wrong 6->9 (+3) vs predicted <=2, slight miss. correct 47->27 collapse implicitly contradicted. Only empty direction right.

trace_movement.justification: Confirmed: no 256 ceiling (max now 512). FALSE: 'more hits 7-8 vs 4-5' - avg retrieved dropped 18.6->15.2. FALSE: 'predictions shorter/more direct' - avg completion rose 148.7->176.8 and all 12 empties burn full 512. One of three verifiable claims confirmed.

side_effects.justification: Correct: completion tokens rose for empties (all 512), prompt tokens rose 1478->1813, wrong-answer regression (+3) flagged. But missed the large passrate collapse 0.47->0.27 and unknown ballooning; predicted gains instead. Risk calls partially right, major regression unforeseen.
